King's College London

Policy Hub

King's College London produces a wide range of corporate documents to ensure that the University is effectively managed in accordance with its Charter and Statutes, legal requirements and standards of best practice.

Policy Hub is a central repository for policies, procedures and other key documents which determine the governance of the University. Further corporate information can be found on our Governance pages.

Please visit our policy updates page to stay up to date with policy developments at King's. For Policy Hub queries, please email governancezone@kcl.ac.uk. 

 

Categories

Document type

Filter by letter

A

Academic Freedom & Freedom of Expression Code of Practice

Policy framework to support the University in meeting statutory duties to secure and promote freedom of speech and protect academic freedom within the law.

King's College London Code of Practice for Academic Freedom and Freedom of Expression (286KB pdf)
Policy statement on Academic Freedom at King's (162KB pdf)
Procedures for events, protests and open space gatherings at King's (300KB pdf)

Academic Misconduct Policy

Policy and procedure outlining the process for handling concerns related to academic misconduct.

Academic Misconduct Policy (319KB pdf)
Academic Misconduct Procedure (184KB pdf)

Academic Regulations 2025-26

Academic regulations ensure the academic integrity of the University and form the framework for the student academic experience, including learning, teaching and assessment.

Academic Staff Capability Regulation

Regulation to assist academic staff in reaching and maintaining required standards of performance.

Academic Staff Capability Regulation (171KB pdf)

Academic Staff Disciplinary Regulation

Regulation setting out the procedure to be followed when the standards of conduct expected by the university are not met.

Academic Staff Disciplinary Regulation (183KB pdf)

Academic Staff Dismissal Regulation

Regulation pertaining to dismissal of academic staff on grounds not covered by other specific regulations.

Regulation pertaining to dismissal on grounds not covered by other specific Regulations (191KB pdf)

Academic Staff Grievance Regulation

Regulation to provide academic staff with access to a fair procedure for addressing grievances relating to their employment.

Academic Staff Grievance Regulation (139KB pdf)

Academic Staff Probation Regulation

Regulation pertaining to probation procedures for academic staff.

Regulation pertaining to probation for academic staff (106KB pdf)

Academic Staff Redundancy Regulation

Regulation pertaining to redundancy procedures for members of academic staff.

Regulation Pertaining to Redundancy Procedure for Academic Staff (137KB pdf)

Academic Study Leave Policy

Policy and guidelines outlining provisions for academic study leave.

Academic Study Leave Policy and Guidelines (150KB pdf)

Accessibility Statements

Statements outlining the University's approach to accessibility of online content in support of equality, diversity and inclusion policies.

Admissions Policy

Policy outlining University processes to ensure fair, transparent and consistent admissions practices.

Admissions Policy (Student Admissions) (618KB pdf)

Adoption Leave & Pay & Surrogacy Policy

Policy outlining the provisions for adoption leave and pay and surrogacy arrangements.

Adoption Leave and Pay and Surrogacy Policy (184KB pdf)

Archives & Special Collections Digitisation Policy

Policy to ensure that digitisation of archives and special collections materials meets the objective of Libraries & Collections to improve access to resources for teaching, learning and research.

Archives and Special Collections Digitisation Policy (213KB pdf)

Armed Forces, Support for Students

Policy on support for students who are members of the UK Armed Forces.

Support for Students in the UK Armed Forces Policy (241KB pdf)

Categories

Document type

Policy updates

Details of newly approved and recently updated documents on Policy Hub.

King's Academic Manual

Academic regulations, policies and procedures applicable to all King's College London students.

Concerns and complaints

Guidance on raising concerns or complaints with King's.

Charter & Statutes

Royal charter granted to King's College London.

Policy on Policies

Framework for the development of university policies and procedures.

Glossary

Guidance on document types within Policy Hub.
